helpful: CourtListener MCP search was helpful to discover the lower court case number.
The metrics/statpack.md base-rate context was helpful for understanding how discretionary cert/appeal dispositions map to outcomes.
gaps: A direct way to get the dockets via MCP call_endpoint using date filters proved cumbersome due to schema restrictions.
notes: The provisioned snapshot contained the true outcome of the case on May 11, 2026 (a GVR). We still predicted as if undecided based on the 6-month hold on the docket.
